prompt: We have a German engineer visiting our facility for 3 weeks to collaborate on a defense electronics project. The project uses ITAR-controlled technical data. What do we need to do before they arrive?

assertions.text: Identifies this as a deemed export situation under 22 CFR 120.50
States that a TAA or individual licence may be required before access is granted
Explains Technology Control Plan (TCP) requirements for foreign visitor access
Mentions screening against DDTC debarred parties list and OFAC SDN list
Clarifies that German citizenship (not work visa status) determines export destination for deemed export purposes
